metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls
The GUID of the Project Parameter record

Update_Calculation.description: Assign newly created Project to Calculation

parameters.$filter: _hso_calculationid_value eq @{outputs('Get_Calculation')?['body/hso_calculationid']} and hso_projecttype eq @{triggerBody()['number']} and hso_positionelementtype eq 100000006 and hso_subproject eq true and hso_level eq 1

External_Services_successfully_calculate.description: At least one External Service calculated to create a corresponding Project Task

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')
@coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')
@coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

Project_Hours_successfully_calculated.description: At least one Project Hour calculated to create a corresponding Project Task

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')
@coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')
@coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

definition.description:
Erstellen der Projektaufgaben für die (Unter-) Projekte welche für eine Kalkulationsversion erstellt wurden.
Dieser Child Flow wird vom Parent Flow "PA | AUTO | Calculation | Create FinOps Project" aufgerufen.
